column1: # A row here lets an allergy BLOCK a medicine. Nothing else does — an unreviewed
# guess produces `warning` at most (spec §2-12). Every row therefore needs a
# reviewer and a source; "it looked similar" is not a source.
# Matching is done on the normalised form (lower case, no dose, no parentheses),
# so write both columns in that form.
# TODO(BE-1 + QA, DEV-305): review and extend before the demo. The list below is
# a seed covering the ingredients our personas actually mention. Do not add a row
# without checking it against 식약처 허가정보 `MAIN_INGR_ENG` values.

column4: INN name; USAN uses acetaminophen. 허가정보 uses "Acetaminophen".
